summary: No tracked uncommitted diff, but the committed slice has material false-operational claims and schema/setup gaps.

findings.title: Modes fitting injects mode-switching and dispatch guarantees before the runtime path exists
findings.recommendation: Do not ship `for_consumers` as live operational guidance until the slice that assembles souls, resolves sticky/channel modes, logs switches, and dispatches Joe actually lands. Either downgrade this text to static package description or add the runtime integration and an end-to-end assertion that `Joe, ...` reaches the native Dev Env path.

findings.title: Default briefs setup creates the directory under the installed fitting, not the composition path James is told to use
findings.recommendation: Resolve relative `briefs_path` values against the composition directory before mkdir, or pass an absolute `MODES_BRIEFS_PATH` from the runner. Add a setup test for the default `./briefs/` path so a passing setup means the actual write target exists.

findings.title: Per-mode faculty map is untyped and contains a non-faculty value
findings.recommendation: Define and validate the modes schema: if this is a faculty map, every value must be a live `FacultyId`; if `knowledge` means the Knowledge fitting/capability, model that explicitly instead of putting it in `faculties`. Extend verify/vitest to reject unknown mode faculties and channel defaults pointing outside `modes`.
